currentSession.summary: Ran four targeted bug fix verification tests against the universal-harness MCP server (http://127.0.0.1:38862/mcp) in a singleplayer Minecraft world. Test 1 (screenChanged honesty after key press) passed cleanly. Test 2 (checkbox toggle via DOM click) passed via click but revealed that `set_dom_value` fails with "element_does_not_support_set_value" for checkboxes despite the DOM advertising `set_value` as an action. Test 3 (text filter rejection on numeric fields) failed — non-numeric text "test123" was incorrectly accepted by a Stack Count integer field, indicating a missing or broken input filter. Test 4 passed. Two bugs were identified: set_value action advertised but unsupported for checkboxes, and numeric field text filter not rejecting non-numeric input.
